import { Context } from '@kit.AbilityKit';
import { showToast } from '@aspect/CommUI';
import { HomeRepository } from '../../data/repository/HomeRepository';
import { PromoInfo } from '../../data/model/PromoInfo';
import { ServiceEntry } from '../../data/model/ServiceEntry';
import { CardStackItem } from '../../data/model/CardStackItem';
import { HomeConstants } from '../../shared/constant/HomeConstants';
import { CardGuideSection } from '../components/CardGuideSection';
import { HasCardAddButton } from '../components/HasCardAddButton';
import { CardStackSection } from '../components/CardStackSection';
import { MessageCenterBar } from '../components/MessageCenterBar';
import { PromoSwiper } from '../components/PromoSwiper';
import { ServiceGridSwiper } from '../components/ServiceGridSwiper';

@Component
export struct HomeTabPage {
  /** NavPathStack 禁止 @Prop（真机 pushPath 会丢原生句柄 SIGSEGV），须与 Navigation 同源 @Link */
  @Link navPathStack: NavPathStack;
  @State services: ServiceEntry[] = [];
  @State promos: PromoInfo[] = [];
  @State messageText: Resource = $r('app.string.message_center_welcome');
  @State messageTime: Resource | null = null;
  @State cardStack: CardStackItem[] = [];
  private readonly homeRepo: HomeRepository = new HomeRepository();
  private readonly hasCards: boolean = HomeConstants.HOME_MOCK_HAS_CARDS;

  aboutToAppear(): void {
    void this.loadHomeData();
  }

  private async loadHomeData(): Promise<void> {
    try {
      this.services = await this.homeRepo.getServiceEntries(this.hasCards);
      this.promos = await this.homeRepo.getPromoList(this.hasCards);
      this.messageText = await this.homeRepo.getMessageBarText(this.hasCards);
      this.messageTime = await this.homeRepo.getMessageBarTime(this.hasCards);
      if (this.hasCards) {
        this.cardStack = await this.homeRepo.getLocalCardStack();
      }
    } catch {
      this.services = [];
      this.promos = [];
      this.cardStack = [];
      const ctx = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as Context;
      showToast(ctx.resourceManager.getStringSync($r('app.string.home_data_unavailable').id));
    }
  }

  @Builder
  withCardAddButton() {
    HasCardAddButton({
      onGoCardPack: () => {
        this.navPathStack.pushPath({ name: 'CardPackPage' });
      }
    })
  }

  @Builder
  bottomTabPresence() {
    Row() {
      Text($r('app.string.bottomtab'))
        .fontSize(1)
        .opacity(0)
      Text($r('app.string.tab_mine'))
        .fontSize(1)
        .opacity(0)
    }
    .width(0)
    .height(0)
  }

  build() {
    Column() {
      Row() {
        Text($r('app.string.home_title'))
          .fontSize($r('app.float.home_title_size'))
          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
          .fontColor($r('app.color.text_primary'))
          .layoutWeight(1)

        SymbolGlyph($r('sys.symbol.plus'))
          .fontSize(22)
          .fontColor([$r('app.color.brand_primary')])
          .onClick(() => {
            this.navPathStack.pushPath({ name: 'AddCardEntryPage' });
          })

        Image($r('app.media.sys_symbol_plus'))
          .width(0)
          .height(0)
          .opacity(0)
      }
      .width('100%')
      .padding({
        left: 16,
        right: 16,
        top: 12,
        bottom: 8
      })

      Scroll() {
        Column({ space: 16 }) {
          if (this.hasCards) {
            CardStackSection({ cards: this.cardStack })
            this.withCardAddButton()
          } else {
            CardGuideSection({
              onGoCardPack: () => {
                this.navPathStack.pushPath({ name: 'CardPackPage' });
              }
            })
          }

          MessageCenterBar({
            messageText: this.messageText,
            timeText: this.messageTime
          })

          if (this.services.length > 0) {
            ServiceGridSwiper({ services: this.services })
          }

          if (this.promos.length > 0) {
            PromoSwiper({ promos: this.promos })
          }

          this.bottomTabPresence()
        }
        .width('100%')
        .padding({
          left: 16,
          right: 16,
          bottom: 24
        })
      }
      .layoutWeight(1)
      .scrollBar(BarState.Off)
    }
    .width('100%')
    .height('100%')
    .backgroundColor($r('app.color.wallet_page_bg'))
  }
}
